name: hud
description: A consolidated, read-only status line for the companion plugins, grouped into three zones split by a dim divider: [health beacon · always-on safety shield 🛡 (🛡✗N when a floor is off) · ✓/✗ tests · 🎨 design-preview gate · 🔒 return-review gate · ❓ parked-decisions/open-questions · ⏳ owner-blocked] │ [feature modes — ✈️ autopilot · 🤖 agents, each icon-led, green on / grey off] │ [model · token throughput ⇡in ⇣out · git branch with dirty */ahead ↑/behind ↓]. Rendered from existing plugin state plus the statusLine payload — no hooks, no scanning, zero model-token cost; empty slots and whole zones collapse when absent, and it sheds low-priority slots on a narrow terminal. It deliberately doesn't re-render signals shown elsewhere (the task list Claude Code renders natively; docs-health charter nudges at session start). Sets refreshInterval:1 so the animated health beacon repaints once a second (this re-runs the render each second — set a longer interval to trade the animation for less frequent wake-ups on a battery device). Run /hud:setup once to wire it into settings.json with a version-resilient command.
